Inject _miroir_shard and _miroir_updated_at into each document\n351\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n352\t    let shard_count = topology.shards;\n353\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n354\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n355\t\n356\t    // Get current timestamp in milliseconds since epoch for _miroir_updated_at stamping\n357\t    let now_ms = if anti_entropy_enabled {\n358\t        Some(\n359\t            std::time::SystemTime::now()\n360\t                .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n361\t                .unwrap_or_default()\n362\t                .as_millis() as u64\n363\t        )\n364\t    } else {\n365\t        None\n366\t    };\n367\t\n368\t    for doc in &mut documents {\n369\t        if let Some(pk_value) = doc.get(&primary_key).and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n370\t            let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, shard_count);\n371\t            doc[\"_miroir_shard\"] = serde_json::json!(shard_id);\n372\t        }\n373\t\n374\t        // Stamp _miroir_updated_at when anti_entropy is enabled (plan §13.8)\n375\t        // This happens AFTER reserved field validation, so orchestrator-controlled injection is allowed\n376\t        if let Some(timestamp) = now_ms {\n377\t            doc[updated_at_field] = serde_json::json!(timestamp);\n378\t        }\n379\t    }\n380\t\n381\t    // 4. Group documents by target nodes (per-batch grouping for efficient fan-out)\n382\t    let node_documents = group_documents_by_shard(&documents, &primary_key, &topology)?;\n383\t\n384\t    // 5. Fan out to nodes and track quorum\n385\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n386\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n387\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n388\t    );\n389\t\n390\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n391\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n392\t\n393\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group (with dual-write support)\n394\t    for (shard_id, docs) in node_documents {\n395\t        // Get migration coordinator reference for dual-write detection\n396\t        let migration_coordinator = state.migration_coordinator.as_ref().map(|c| {\n397\t            // We need a read lock on the coordinator\n398\t            tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n399\t                tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n400\t                    c.read().await\n401\t                })\n402\t            })\n403\t        });\n404\t\n405\t        // Use migration-aware routing\n406\t        let targets = write_targets_with_migration(\n407\t            shard_id,\n408\t            &topology,\n409\t            migration_coordinator.as_deref(),\n410\t        );\n411\t\n412\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n413\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n414\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n415\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n416\t            ));\n417\t        }\n418\t\n419\t        // Track which groups we're targeting for this shard\n420\t\n421\t        for node_id in targets {\n422\t            let node = topology\n423\t                .node(&node_id)\n424\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n425\t\n426\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n427\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n428\t\n429\t            let req = WriteRequest {\n430\t                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n431\t                documents: docs.clone(),\n432\t                primary_key: Some(primary_key.clone()),\n433\t                origin: None, // Client write\n434\t            };\n435\t\n436\t            match client.write_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n437\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n438\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n439\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n440\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n441\t                    }\n442\t                }\n443\t                Ok(resp) => {\n444\t                    // Non-success response (validation error, etc.)\n445\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n446\t                }\n447\t                Err(_) => {\n448\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n449\t                }\n450\t            }\n451\t        }\n452\t    }\n453\t\n454\t    // 6. Apply two-rule quorum logic\n455\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n456\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n457\t\n458\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n459\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n460\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n461\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n462\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n463\t        ));\n464\t    }\n465\t\n466\t    // 6.5. Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n467\t    // Groups are checked in ascending order, so the first one with quorum is the first\n468\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n469\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n470\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n471\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n472\t            acks >= quorum\n473\t        })\n474\t        .unwrap_or(0); // Default to group 0 if somehow no quorum (shouldn't happen here)\n475\t\n476\t    // 7. Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n477\t    let miroir_task = state\n478\t        .task_registry\n479\t        .register_with_metadata(\n480\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n481\t            Some(index_uid.clone()),\n482\t            Some(\"documentAdditionOrUpdate\".to_string()),\n483\t        )\n484\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n485\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n486\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n487\t        ))?;\n488\t\n489\t    // 7.5. Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n490\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n491\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n492\t            sid,\n493\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n494\t            first_quorum_group,\n495\t        ).await {\n496\t            // Log error but don't fail the write - session pinning is best-effort\n497\t            tracing::error!(\n498\t                session_id = %sid,\n499\t                error = %e,\n500\t                \"failed to record session pinning for write\"\n501\t            );\n502\t        }\n503\t    }\n504\t\n505\t    // Build success response with degraded header and mtask ID\n506\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n507\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n508\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n509\t            indexUid: Some(index_uid.clone()),\n510\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n511\t            error: None,\n512\t            error_type: None,\n513\t            code: None,\n514\t            link: None,\n515\t        },\n516\t        degraded_groups,\n517\t    )\n518\t}\n519\t\n520\t/// Implementation for delete by IDs.\n521\tasync fn delete_by_ids_impl(\n522\t    index: String,\n523\t    req: DeleteByIdsRequest,\n524\t    state: &AppState,\n525\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n526\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n527\t    if req.ids.is_empty() {\n528\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n529\t            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n530\t            \"cannot delete empty ID list\",\n531\t        ));\n532\t    }\n533\t\n534\t    // Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n535\t    let index_uid = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n536\t        let resolved = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n537\t        if resolved != vec![index.clone()] {\n538\t            // It was an alias - check if it's a multi-target alias (read-only)\n539\t            if state.alias_registry.is_multi_target_alias(&index).await {\n540\t                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n541\t                    MiroirCode::MultiAliasNotWritable,\n542\t                    format!(\n543\t                        \"alias '{}' is a multi-target alias and is read-only (managed by ILM); deletes must go to the concrete index or the write alias\",\n544\t                        index\n545\t                    ),\n546\t                ));\n547\t            }\n548\t            // Single-target alias: record resolution metric and use the target\n549\t            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n550\t            resolved.into_iter().next().unwrap_or_else(|| index.clone())\n551\t        } else {\n552\t            index.clone()\n553\t        }\n554\t    } else {\n555\t        index.clone()\n556\t    };\n557\t\n558\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n559\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n560\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n561\t\n562\t    // Group IDs by target shard for independent per-shard routing\n563\t    let mut shard_ids: HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = HashMap::new();\n564\t    for id in &req.ids {\n565\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, topology.shards);\n566\t        shard_ids.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.clone());\n567\t    }\n568\t\n569\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n570\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n571\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n572\t    );\n573\t\n574\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n575\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n576\t\n577\t    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group\n578\t    for (shard_id, ids) in shard_ids {\n579\t        let targets = miroir_core::router::write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n580\t\n581\t        if targets.is_empty() {\n582\t            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n583\t                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n584\t                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n585\t            ));\n586\t        }\n587\t\n588\t        for node_id in targets {\n589\t            let node = topology\n590\t                .node(&node_id)\n591\t                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n592\t\n593\t            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n594\t            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n595\t\n596\t            let delete_req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n597\t                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n598\t                ids: ids.clone(),\n599\t                origin: None, // Client write\n600\t            };\n601\t\n602\t            match client.delete_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &delete_req).await {\n603\t                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n604\t                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n605\t                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n606\t                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n607\t                    }\n608\t                }\n609\t                Ok(resp) => {\n610\t                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n611\t                }\n612\t                Err(_) => {\n613\t                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n614\t                }\n615\t            }\n616\t        }\n617\t    }\n618\t\n619\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n620\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n621\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n622\t\n623\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n624\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n625\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n626\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n627\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n628\t        ));\n629\t    }\n630\t\n631\t    // Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n632\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n633\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n634\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n635\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n636\t            acks >= quorum\n637\t        })\n638\t        .unwrap_or(0);\n639\t\n640\t    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n641\t    let miroir_task = state\n642\t        .task_registry\n643\t        .register_with_metadata(\n644\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n645\t            Some(index.clone()),\n646\t            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n647\t        )\n648\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n649\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n650\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n651\t        ))?;\n652\t\n653\t    // Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n654\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n655\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n656\t            sid,\n657\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n658\t            first_quorum_group,\n659\t        ).await {\n660\t            tracing::error!(\n661\t                session_id = %sid,\n662\t                error = %e,\n663\t                \"failed to record session pinning for delete\"\n664\t            );\n665\t        }\n666\t    }\n667\t\n668\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n669\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n670\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n671\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n672\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n673\t            error: None,\n674\t            error_type: None,\n675\t            code: None,\n676\t            link: None,\n677\t        },\n678\t        degraded_groups,\n679\t    )\n680\t}\n681\t\n682\t/// Implementation for delete by filter (broadcast to all nodes).\n683\tasync fn delete_by_filter_impl(\n684\t    index: String,\n685\t    req: DeleteByFilterRequest,\n686\t    state: &AppState,\n687\t    session_id: Option<String>,\n688\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n689\t    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n690\t    let rf = topology.rf();\n691\t    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n692\t\n693\t    let client = HttpClient::new(\n694\t        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n695\t        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n696\t    );\n697\t\n698\t    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n699\t    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n700\t\n701\t    // Broadcast to all nodes (cannot shard-route for filters)\n702\t    for node in topology.nodes() {\n703\t        let group_id = node.replica_group;\n704\t        quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node.id);\n705\t\n706\t        match client\n707\t            .delete_documents_by_filter(&node.id, &node.address, &req)\n708\t            .await\n709\t        {\n710\t            Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n711\t                quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node.id);\n712\t                if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n713\t                    node_task_uids.insert(node.id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n714\t                }\n715\t            }\n716\t            Ok(resp) => {\n717\t                return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n718\t            }\n719\t            Err(_) => {\n720\t                quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n721\t            }\n722\t        }\n723\t    }\n724\t\n725\t    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n726\t    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n727\t    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n728\t\n729\t    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n730\t    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n731\t        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n732\t            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n733\t            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n734\t        ));\n735\t    }\n736\t\n737\t    // Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n738\t    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n739\t        .find(|&group_id| {\n740\t            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n741\t            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n742\t            acks >= quorum\n743\t        })\n744\t        .unwrap_or(0);\n745\t\n746\t    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n747\t    let miroir_task = state\n748\t        .task_registry\n749\t        .register_with_metadata(\n750\t            node_task_uids.clone(),\n751\t            Some(index.clone()),\n752\t            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n753\t        )\n754\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n755\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n756\t            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n757\t        ))?;\n758\t\n759\t    // Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n760\t    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n761\t        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n762\t            sid,\n763\t            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n764\t            first_quorum_group,\n765\t        ).await {\n766\t            tracing::error!(\n767\t                session_id = %sid,\n768\t                error = %e,\n769\t                \"failed to record session pinning for delete by filter\"\n770\t            );\n771\t        }\n772\t    }\n773\t\n774\t    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n775\t        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n776\t            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n777\t            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n778\t            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n779\t            error: None,\n780\t            error_type: None,\n781\t            code: None,\n782\t            link: None,\n783\t        },\n784\t        degraded_groups,\n785\t    )\n786\t}\n787\t\n788\t/// Extract primary key from a document by checking common field names.\n789\t///\n790\t/// Tries fields in order: id, pk, key, _id.\n791\tfn extract_primary_key(doc: &Value) -> Option<String> {\n792\t    [\"id\", \"pk\", \"key\", \"_id\"]\n793\t        .iter()\n794\t        .find(|&&key| doc.get(key).is_some())\n795\t        .map(|&s| s.to_string())\n796\t}\n797\t\n798\t/// Group documents by their target shard for fan-out optimization.\n799\t///\n800\t/// Returns a map of shard_id -> documents to send to that shard.\n801\t/// The caller then fans out each shard's documents to all RF nodes in each group.\n802\t///\n803\t/// This per-batch grouping minimizes HTTP fan-out count (critical at scale).\n804\tfn group_documents_by_shard(\n805\t    documents: &[Value],\n806\t    primary_key: &str,\n807\t    topology: &Topology,\n808\t) -> std::result::Result<HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>>, MeilisearchError> {\n809\t    let mut shard_documents: HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = HashMap::new();\n810\t\n811\t    for doc in documents {\n812\t        let pk_value = doc\n813\t            .get(primary_key)\n814\t            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n815\t            .ok_or_else(|| {\n816\t                MeilisearchError::new(\n817\t                    MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n818\t                    \"primary key value must be a string\",\n819\t                )\n820\t            })?;\n821\t\n822\t        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, topology.shards);\n823\t        shard_documents\n824\t            .entry(shard_id)\n825\t            .or_default()\n826\t            .push(doc.clone());\n827\t    }\n828\t\n829\t    Ok(shard_documents)\n830\t}\n831\t\n832\t/// Build an error response from a node error.\n833\tfn build_error_response(resp: WriteResponse) -> DocumentsWriteResponse {\n834\t    DocumentsWriteResponse {\n835\t        taskUid: resp.task_uid.map(|uid| uid.to_string()),\n836\t        indexUid: None,\n837\t        status: None,\n838\t        error: resp.message,\n839\t        error_type: resp.error_type,\n840\t        code: resp.code,\n841\t        link: None,\n842\t    }\n843\t}\n844\t\n845\t/// Build a success response with optional X-Miroir-Degraded header.\n846\tfn build_response_with_degraded_header(\n847\t    response: DocumentsWriteResponse,\n848\t    degraded_groups: u32,\n849\t) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n850\t    let body = serde_json::to_string(&response).map_err(|e| {\n851\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n852\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n853\t            format!(\"failed to serialize response: {}\", e),\n854\t        )\n855\t    })?;\n856\t\n857\t    let mut builder = Response::builder()\n858\t        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n859\t        .header(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\");\n860\t\n861\t    // Add X-Miroir-Degraded header if any groups were degraded\n862\t    if degraded_groups > 0 {\n863\t        builder = builder.header(HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED, format!(\"groups={}\", degraded_groups));\n864\t    }\n865\t\n866\t    Ok(builder\n867\t        .body(axum::body::Body::from(body))\n868\t        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n869\t            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n870\t            format!(\"failed to build response: {}\", e),\n871\t        ))?)\n872\t}\n873\t\n874\t/// Build an error response as JSON (for forwarded node errors).\n875\tfn build_json_error_response(resp: DocumentsWriteResponse) -> Response {\n876\t    (\n877\t        StatusCode::OK,\n878\t        [(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\")],\n879\t        Json(resp),\n880\t    )\n881\t        .into_response()\n882\t}\n883\t\n884\t#[cfg(test)]\n885\tmod tests {\n886\t    use super::*;\n887\t    use miroir_core::api_error::{MiroirCode, MeilisearchError};\n888\t    use serde_json::json;\n889\t\n890\t    #[test]\n891\t    fn test_extract_primary_key_common_fields() {\n892\t        let doc_with_id = serde_json::json!({\"id\": \"test123\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n893\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_id), Some(\"id\".to_string()));\n894\t\n895\t        let doc_with_pk = serde_json::json!({\"pk\": \"test456\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n896\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_pk), Some(\"pk\".to_string()));\n897\t\n898\t        let doc_with_key = serde_json::json!({\"key\": \"test789\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n899\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_key), Some(\"key\".to_string()));\n900\t\n901\t        let doc_with__id = serde_json::json!({\"_id\": \"test000\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n902\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with__id), Some(\"_id\".to_string()));\n903\t    }\n904\t\n905\t    #[test]\n906\t    fn test_extract_primary_key_no_common_field() {\n907\t        let doc = serde_json::json!({\"name\": \"Test\", \"value\": 42});\n908\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc), None);\n909\t    }\n910\t\n911\t    #[test]\n912\t    fn test_extract_primary_key_priority() {\n913\t        // Should return \"id\" first even if other fields exist\n914\t        let doc = serde_json::json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"pk\": \"other\", \"key\": \"another\"});\n915\t        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc), Some(\"id\".to_string()));\n916\t    }\n917\t\n918\t    // Reserved field validation tests (P2.9)\n919\t    //\n920\t    // Tests the reserved field matrix per plan §5:\n921\t    // - `_miroir_shard`: Always reserved (unconditional)\n922\t    // - `_miroir_updated_at`: Reserved only when `anti_entropy.enabled: true`\n923\t    // - `_miroir_expires_at`: Reserved only when `ttl.enabled: true`\n924\t\n925\t    /// Helper to build the expected reserved field error.\n926\t    fn reserved_field_error(field: &str) -> MeilisearchError {\n927\t        MeilisearchError::new(\n928\t            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n929\t            format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}`\", field),\n930\t        )\n931\t    }\n932\t\n933\t    #[test]\n934\t    fn test_reserved_field_miroir_shard_always_rejected() {\n935\t        // _miroir_shard is ALWAYS reserved regardless of config\n936\t        let err = reserved_field_error(\"_miroir_shard\");\n937\t        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n938\t        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n939\t        assert_eq!(err.error_type, miroir_core::api_error::ErrorType::InvalidRequest);\n940\t    }\n941\t\n942\t    #[test]\n943\t    fn test_reserved_field_miroir_updated_at_when_anti_entropy_enabled() {\n944\t        // When anti_entropy.enabled: true, _miroir_updated_at is reserved\n945\t        let field = \"_miroir_updated_at\";\n946\t        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n947\t            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n948\t            format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when anti_entropy.enabled: true)\", field),\n949\t        );\n950\t        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n951\t        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n952\t    }\n953\t\n954\t    #[test]\n955\t    fn test_reserved_field_miroir_expires_at_when_ttl_enabled() {\n956\t        // When ttl.enabled: true, _miroir_expires_at is reserved\n957\t        let field = \"_miroir_expires_at\";\n958\t        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n959\t            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n960\t            format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when ttl.enabled: true)\", field),\n961\t        );\n962\t        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n963\t        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n964\t    }\n965\t\n966\t    #[test]\n967\t    fn test_reserved_field_non_miroir_fields_allowed() {\n968\t        // Non-reserved _miroir_ fields are allowed\n969\t        let doc = json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_custom\": \"value\", \"_miroir_metadata\": {\"key\": \"val\"}});\n970\t        assert!(doc.get(\"_miroir_custom\").is_some());\n971\t        assert!(doc.get(\"_miroir_metadata\").is_some());\n972\t    }\n973\t\n974\t    /// Test matrix of all reserved field combinations per plan §5 table.\n975\t    ///\n976\t    /// Matrix cells (write behavior):\n977\t    /// | Field           | Config disabled | Config enabled |\n978\t    /// |-----------------|-----------------|----------------|\n979\t    /// | _miroir_shard   | REJECTED (always)  | REJECTED (always) |\n980\t    /// | _miroir_updated_at | ALLOWED      | REJECTED (anti_entropy) |\n981\t    /// | _miroir_expires_at | ALLOWED      | REJECTED (ttl) |\n982\t    #[test]\n983\t    fn test_reserved_field_matrix() {\n984\t        struct TestCase {\n985\t }\n1187\t}\n1188\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"c2581273-2e60-4a3c-8841-5bdfc54761f6","uuid":"0a21e91d-1c27-40a4-b6e2-972685b55b2f","timestamp":"2026-05-23T17:02:10.744Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/home/coding/miroir/crates/miroir-proxy/src/routes/documents.rs","content":"//! Document write path: add, replace, and delete documents.\n//!\n//! Implements P2.2 write path:\n//! - Primary key extraction on the hot path\n//! - `_miroir_shard` injection\n//! - Reserved field rejection\n//! - Two-rule quorum\n//!\n//! Implements P2.5 task reconciliation:\n//! - Collects per-node task UIDs\n//! - Registers Miroir task ID (mtask-<uuid>)\n//! - Returns mtask ID to client\n//!\n//! Implements §13.6 session pinning:\n//! - Records writes with session header\n//! - Tracks pinned group (first to reach quorum)\n\nuse axum::extract::{Extension, Path, Query};\nuse axum::response::{IntoResponse, Response};\nuse axum::http::{StatusCode, header};\nuse axum::{Json, Router};\nuse miroir_core::api_error::{MiroirCode, MeilisearchError};\nuse miroir_core::router::{shard_for_key, write_targets_with_migration};\nuse miroir_core::scatter::{DeleteByIdsRequest, DeleteByFilterRequest, NodeClient, WriteRequest, WriteResponse};\nuse miroir_core::task::TaskRegistry;\nuse miroir_core::topology::{Topology, NodeId};\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\nuse serde_json::Value;\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\nuse std::sync::Arc;\nuse tracing::{debug, info, instrument};\n\nuse crate::client::HttpClient;\nuse crate::middleware::SessionId;\nuse crate::routes::admin_endpoints::AppState;\n\n/// Document write parameters from query string.\n#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]\npub struct DocumentsParams {\n    primaryKey: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Task response (Meilisearch-compatible).\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\npub struct TaskResponse {\n    taskUid: u64,\n    indexUid: String,\n    status: String,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    error: Option<Value>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    error_type: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Response for write operations.\n#[derive(Debug, Serialize)]\npub struct DocumentsWriteResponse {\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    taskUid: Option<String>, // Changed to String to hold mtask-<uuid>\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    indexUid: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    status: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    error: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    error_type: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    code: Option<String>,\n    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = \"Option::is_none\")]\n    link: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Header name for degraded write responses.\npub const HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED: &str = \"X-Miroir-Degraded\";\n\n/// Quorum tracking state for write operations.\n#[derive(Debug, Default)]\nstruct QuorumState {\n    /// Per-group ACK counts: group_id -> successful_ack_count\n    group_acks: HashMap<u32, usize>,\n    /// Per-group total node counts: group_id -> total_nodes_attempted\n    group_totals: HashMap<u32, usize>,\n    /// Groups that met quorum: group_id -> true\n    groups_met_quorum: HashMap<u32, bool>,\n    /// Total degraded groups count\n    degraded_groups: u32,\n}\n\nimpl QuorumState {\n    /// Record a write attempt to a node.\n    fn record_attempt(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n        *self.group_totals.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n    }\n\n    /// Record a successful write ACK from a node.\n    fn record_success(&mut self, group_id: u32, _node_id: &NodeId) {\n        *self.group_acks.entry(group_id).or_insert(0) += 1;\n    }\n\n    /// Record a failed write attempt from a node.\n    fn record_failure(&mut self, _group_id: u32) {\n        // Track that this group had a failure\n        // Degraded is determined after checking quorum\n    }\n\n    /// Check if a group has met quorum: floor(RF/2) + 1 ACKs required.\n    fn check_group_quorum(&mut self, group_id: u32, rf: usize) -> bool {\n        let acks = *self.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n        let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n        let met = acks >= quorum;\n        *self.groups_met_quorum.entry(group_id).or_insert(false) = met;\n        met\n    }\n\n    /// Count how many groups met quorum.\n    fn count_quorum_groups(&self) -> usize {\n        self.groups_met_quorum.values().filter(|&&v| v).count()\n    }\n\n    /// Count degraded groups (groups that exist but didn't meet quorum).\n    fn count_degraded_groups(&mut self, replica_group_count: u32, rf: usize) -> u32 {\n        let mut degraded = 0u32;\n        for group_id in 0..replica_group_count {\n            if !self.check_group_quorum(group_id, rf) {\n                // Only count as degraded if we attempted to write to this group\n                if self.group_totals.contains_key(&group_id) {\n                    degraded += 1;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        degraded\n    }\n}\n\n/// Build router for document endpoints.\npub fn router<S>() -> Router<S>\nwhere\n    S: Clone + Send + Sync + 'static,\n{\n    Router::new()\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::post(post_documents))\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::put(put_documents))\n        .route(\"/\", axum::routing::delete(delete_documents))\n        .route(\"/:id\", axum::routing::delete(delete_document_by_id))\n}\n\n/// POST /indexes/{uid}/documents - Add documents.\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index))]\nasync fn post_documents(\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    // Extract session ID from request extensions (set by session_pinning_middleware)\n    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n        let s = ext.0;\n        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n    });\n\n    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state, sid).await\n}\n\n/// PUT /indexes/{uid}/documents - Replace documents.\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index))]\nasync fn put_documents(\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    Query(params): Query<DocumentsParams>,\n    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n    Json(documents): Json<Vec<Value>>,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n        let s = ext.0;\n        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n    });\n    write_documents_impl(index, params.primaryKey, documents, &state, sid).await\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents - Delete by IDs or filter.\nasync fn delete_documents(\n    Path(index): Path<String>,\n    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n    Json(body): Json<Value>,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n        let s = ext.0;\n        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n    });\n\n    // Try to parse as delete by filter first\n    if let Some(filter) = body.get(\"filter\") {\n        let req = DeleteByFilterRequest {\n            index_uid: index.clone(),\n            filter: filter.clone(),\n            origin: None, // Client write\n        };\n        return delete_by_filter_impl(index, req, &state, sid).await;\n    }\n\n    // Try to parse as delete by IDs\n    if let Some(ids) = body.get(\"ids\").and_then(|v| v.as_array()) {\n        let ids: Vec<String> = ids\n            .iter()\n            .filter_map(|v| v.as_str().map(|s| s.to_string()))\n            .collect();\n        if !ids.is_empty() {\n            let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n                index_uid: index.clone(),\n                ids,\n                origin: None, // Client write\n            };\n            return delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state, sid).await;\n        }\n    }\n\n    // If we get here, the request body is malformed\n    Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n        MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n        \"delete request must include either 'filter' or 'ids' field\",\n    ))\n}\n\n/// DELETE /indexes/{uid}/documents/{id} - Delete single document by ID.\nasync fn delete_document_by_id(\n    Path((index, id)): Path<(String, String)>,\n    Extension(state): Extension<Arc<AppState>>,\n    session_id: Option<Extension<crate::middleware::SessionId>>,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    let sid = session_id.and_then(|ext| {\n        let s = ext.0;\n        if s.0.is_empty() { None } else { Some(s.0.clone()) }\n    });\n    let req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n        index_uid: index.clone(),\n        ids: vec![id],\n        origin: None, // Client write\n    };\n    delete_by_ids_impl(index, req, &state, sid).await\n}\n\n/// Implementation for write documents (POST/PUT).\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %index, session_id))]\nasync fn write_documents_impl(\n    index: String,\n    primary_key: Option<String>,\n    mut documents: Vec<Value>,\n    state: &AppState,\n    session_id: Option<String>,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    if documents.is_empty() {\n        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n            \"cannot write empty document batch\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // 1. Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n    // Aliases are resolved before any processing; writes to multi-target aliases are rejected\n    let index_uid = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n        // Check if the index is an alias\n        let resolved = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n        if resolved != vec![index.clone()] {\n            // It was an alias\n            // Check if it's a multi-target alias (read-only, ILM-managed)\n            if state.alias_registry.is_multi_target_alias(&index).await {\n                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                    MiroirCode::MultiAliasNotWritable,\n                    format!(\n                        \"alias '{}' is a multi-target alias and is read-only (managed by ILM); writes must go to the concrete index or the write alias\",\n                        index\n                    ),\n                ));\n            }\n            // Single-target alias: record resolution metric and use the target\n            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n            resolved.into_iter().next().unwrap_or_else(|| index.clone())\n        } else {\n            // Not an alias, use the index name as-is\n            index.clone()\n        }\n    } else {\n        index.clone()\n    };\n\n    // 1. Extract primary key from first document if not provided\n    let primary_key = primary_key.or_else(|| {\n        documents\n            .first()\n            .and_then(|doc| extract_primary_key(doc))\n    });\n\n    let primary_key = primary_key.ok_or_else(|| {\n        MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n            format!(\"primary key required for index `{}`\", index),\n        )\n    })?;\n\n    // 2. Validate all documents have the primary key and check for reserved field\n    let anti_entropy_enabled = state.config.anti_entropy.enabled;\n    let updated_at_field = &state.config.anti_entropy.updated_at_field;\n    let ttl_enabled = state.config.ttl.enabled;\n    let expires_at_field = &state.config.ttl.expires_at_field;\n\n    for (i, doc) in documents.iter().enumerate() {\n        // Check for reserved field BEFORE checking primary key (per acceptance criteria)\n        // _miroir_shard is ALWAYS reserved (plan §5)\n        if doc.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_some() {\n            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n                \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_shard`\",\n            ));\n        }\n\n        // _miroir_updated_at is reserved ONLY when anti_entropy.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.8)\n        if anti_entropy_enabled && doc.get(updated_at_field).is_some() {\n            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when anti_entropy.enabled: true)\", updated_at_field),\n            ));\n        }\n\n        // _miroir_expires_at is reserved ONLY when ttl.enabled: true (plan §5, §13.14)\n        // When reserved, clients cannot SET it; the orchestrator controls it. When disabled,\n        // client values pass through end-to-end.\n        if ttl_enabled && doc.get(expires_at_field).is_some() {\n            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n                format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when ttl.enabled: true)\", expires_at_field),\n            ));\n        }\n\n        if doc.get(&primary_key).is_none() {\n            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n                format!(\n                    \"document at index {} missing primary key field `{}`\",\n                    i, primary_key\n                ),\n            ));\n        }\n    }\n\n    // 3. Inject _miroir_shard and _miroir_updated_at into each document\n    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n    let shard_count = topology.shards;\n    let rf = topology.rf();\n    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n\n    // Get current timestamp in milliseconds since epoch for _miroir_updated_at stamping\n    let now_ms = if anti_entropy_enabled {\n        Some(\n            std::time::SystemTime::now()\n                .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n                .unwrap_or_default()\n                .as_millis() as u64\n        )\n    } else {\n        None\n    };\n\n    for doc in &mut documents {\n        if let Some(pk_value) = doc.get(&primary_key).and_then(|v| v.as_str()) {\n            let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, shard_count);\n            doc[\"_miroir_shard\"] = serde_json::json!(shard_id);\n        }\n\n        // Stamp _miroir_updated_at when anti_entropy is enabled (plan §13.8)\n        // This happens AFTER reserved field validation, so orchestrator-controlled injection is allowed\n        if let Some(timestamp) = now_ms {\n            doc[updated_at_field] = serde_json::json!(timestamp);\n        }\n    }\n\n    // 4. Group documents by target nodes (per-batch grouping for efficient fan-out)\n    let node_documents = group_documents_by_shard(&documents, &primary_key, &topology)?;\n\n    // 5. Fan out to nodes and track quorum\n    let client = HttpClient::new(\n        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n    );\n\n    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n\n    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group (with dual-write support)\n    for (shard_id, docs) in node_documents {\n        // Get migration coordinator reference for dual-write detection\n        let migration_coordinator = state.migration_coordinator.as_ref().map(|c| {\n            // We need a read lock on the coordinator\n            tokio::task::block_in_place(|| {\n                tokio::runtime::Handle::current().block_on(async {\n                    c.read().await\n                })\n            })\n        });\n\n        // Use migration-aware routing\n        let targets = write_targets_with_migration(\n            shard_id,\n            &topology,\n            migration_coordinator.as_deref(),\n        );\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n            ));\n        }\n\n        // Track which groups we're targeting for this shard\n\n        for node_id in targets {\n            let node = topology\n                .node(&node_id)\n                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n\n            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n\n            let req = WriteRequest {\n                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n                documents: docs.clone(),\n                primary_key: Some(primary_key.clone()),\n                origin: None, // Client write\n            };\n\n            match client.write_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n                    }\n                }\n                Ok(resp) => {\n                    // Non-success response (validation error, etc.)\n                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n                }\n                Err(_) => {\n                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // 6. Apply two-rule quorum logic\n    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n\n    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // 6.5. Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n    // Groups are checked in ascending order, so the first one with quorum is the first\n    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n        .find(|&group_id| {\n            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n            acks >= quorum\n        })\n        .unwrap_or(0); // Default to group 0 if somehow no quorum (shouldn't happen here)\n\n    // 7. Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n    let miroir_task = state\n        .task_registry\n        .register_with_metadata(\n            node_task_uids.clone(),\n            Some(index_uid.clone()),\n            Some(\"documentAdditionOrUpdate\".to_string()),\n        )\n        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n        ))?;\n\n    // 7.5. Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n            sid,\n            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n            first_quorum_group,\n        ).await {\n            // Log error but don't fail the write - session pinning is best-effort\n            tracing::error!(\n                session_id = %sid,\n                error = %e,\n                \"failed to record session pinning for write\"\n            );\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Build success response with degraded header and mtask ID\n    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n            indexUid: Some(index_uid.clone()),\n            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n            error: None,\n            error_type: None,\n            code: None,\n            link: None,\n        },\n        degraded_groups,\n    )\n}\n\n/// Implementation for delete by IDs.\nasync fn delete_by_ids_impl(\n    index: String,\n    req: DeleteByIdsRequest,\n    state: &AppState,\n    session_id: Option<String>,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    if req.ids.is_empty() {\n        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n            \"cannot delete empty ID list\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // Resolve alias to concrete index UID (plan §13.7)\n    let index_uid = if state.config.aliases.enabled {\n        let resolved = state.alias_registry.resolve(&index).await;\n        if resolved != vec![index.clone()] {\n            // It was an alias - check if it's a multi-target alias (read-only)\n            if state.alias_registry.is_multi_target_alias(&index).await {\n                return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                    MiroirCode::MultiAliasNotWritable,\n                    format!(\n                        \"alias '{}' is a multi-target alias and is read-only (managed by ILM); deletes must go to the concrete index or the write alias\",\n                        index\n                    ),\n                ));\n            }\n            // Single-target alias: record resolution metric and use the target\n            state.metrics.inc_alias_resolution(&index);\n            resolved.into_iter().next().unwrap_or_else(|| index.clone())\n        } else {\n            index.clone()\n        }\n    } else {\n        index.clone()\n    };\n\n    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n    let rf = topology.rf();\n    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n\n    // Group IDs by target shard for independent per-shard routing\n    let mut shard_ids: HashMap<u32, Vec<String>> = HashMap::new();\n    for id in &req.ids {\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(id, topology.shards);\n        shard_ids.entry(shard_id).or_default().push(id.clone());\n    }\n\n    let client = HttpClient::new(\n        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n    );\n\n    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n\n    // For each shard, write to all RF nodes in each replica group\n    for (shard_id, ids) in shard_ids {\n        let targets = miroir_core::router::write_targets(shard_id, &topology);\n\n        if targets.is_empty() {\n            return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n                MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n                format!(\"no available nodes for shard {}\", shard_id),\n            ));\n        }\n\n        for node_id in targets {\n            let node = topology\n                .node(&node_id)\n                .ok_or_else(|| MeilisearchError::new(MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable, \"node not found in topology\"))?;\n\n            let group_id = node.replica_group;\n            quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node_id);\n\n            let delete_req = DeleteByIdsRequest {\n                index_uid: index_uid.clone(),\n                ids: ids.clone(),\n                origin: None, // Client write\n            };\n\n            match client.delete_documents(&node_id, &node.address, &delete_req).await {\n                Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n                    quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node_id);\n                    if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n                        node_task_uids.insert(node_id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n                    }\n                }\n                Ok(resp) => {\n                    return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n                }\n                Err(_) => {\n                    quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n\n    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n        .find(|&group_id| {\n            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n            acks >= quorum\n        })\n        .unwrap_or(0);\n\n    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n    let miroir_task = state\n        .task_registry\n        .register_with_metadata(\n            node_task_uids.clone(),\n            Some(index.clone()),\n            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n        )\n        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n        ))?;\n\n    // Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n            sid,\n            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n            first_quorum_group,\n        ).await {\n            tracing::error!(\n                session_id = %sid,\n                error = %e,\n                \"failed to record session pinning for delete\"\n            );\n        }\n    }\n\n    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n            error: None,\n            error_type: None,\n            code: None,\n            link: None,\n        },\n        degraded_groups,\n    )\n}\n\n/// Implementation for delete by filter (broadcast to all nodes).\nasync fn delete_by_filter_impl(\n    index: String,\n    req: DeleteByFilterRequest,\n    state: &AppState,\n    session_id: Option<String>,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    let topology = state.topology.read().await;\n    let rf = topology.rf();\n    let replica_group_count = topology.replica_group_count();\n\n    let client = HttpClient::new(\n        state.config.node_master_key.clone(),\n        state.config.scatter.node_timeout_ms,\n    );\n\n    let mut quorum_state = QuorumState::default();\n    let mut node_task_uids: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n\n    // Broadcast to all nodes (cannot shard-route for filters)\n    for node in topology.nodes() {\n        let group_id = node.replica_group;\n        quorum_state.record_attempt(group_id, &node.id);\n\n        match client\n            .delete_documents_by_filter(&node.id, &node.address, &req)\n            .await\n        {\n            Ok(resp) if resp.success => {\n                quorum_state.record_success(group_id, &node.id);\n                if let Some(task_uid) = resp.task_uid {\n                    node_task_uids.insert(node.id.as_str().to_string(), task_uid);\n                }\n            }\n            Ok(resp) => {\n                return Ok(build_json_error_response(build_error_response(resp)));\n            }\n            Err(_) => {\n                quorum_state.record_failure(group_id);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Apply two-rule quorum logic\n    let degraded_groups = quorum_state.count_degraded_groups(replica_group_count, rf);\n    let quorum_groups = quorum_state.count_quorum_groups();\n\n    // Write success if at least one group met quorum\n    if quorum_groups == 0 {\n        return Err(MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::NoQuorum,\n            \"no replica group met quorum\",\n        ));\n    }\n\n    // Find the first group to reach quorum (for session pinning, plan §13.6)\n    let first_quorum_group = (0..replica_group_count)\n        .find(|&group_id| {\n            let acks = *quorum_state.group_acks.get(&group_id).unwrap_or(&0);\n            let quorum = (rf / 2) + 1;\n            acks >= quorum\n        })\n        .unwrap_or(0);\n\n    // Register Miroir task with collected node task UIDs\n    let miroir_task = state\n        .task_registry\n        .register_with_metadata(\n            node_task_uids.clone(),\n            Some(index.clone()),\n            Some(\"documentDeletion\".to_string()),\n        )\n        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n            format!(\"failed to register task: {}\", e),\n        ))?;\n\n    // Record session pinning if session header present (plan §13.6)\n    if let (Some(ref sid), true) = (&session_id, state.session_manager.is_enabled()) {\n        if let Err(e) = state.session_manager.record_write_with_quorum(\n            sid,\n            miroir_task.miroir_id.clone(),\n            first_quorum_group,\n        ).await {\n            tracing::error!(\n                session_id = %sid,\n                error = %e,\n                \"failed to record session pinning for delete by filter\"\n            );\n        }\n    }\n\n    build_response_with_degraded_header(\n        DocumentsWriteResponse {\n            taskUid: Some(miroir_task.miroir_id),\n            indexUid: Some(index.clone()),\n            status: Some(\"enqueued\".to_string()),\n            error: None,\n            error_type: None,\n            code: None,\n            link: None,\n        },\n        degraded_groups,\n    )\n}\n\n/// Extract primary key from a document by checking common field names.\n///\n/// Tries fields in order: id, pk, key, _id.\nfn extract_primary_key(doc: &Value) -> Option<String> {\n    [\"id\", \"pk\", \"key\", \"_id\"]\n        .iter()\n        .find(|&&key| doc.get(key).is_some())\n        .map(|&s| s.to_string())\n}\n\n/// Group documents by their target shard for fan-out optimization.\n///\n/// Returns a map of shard_id -> documents to send to that shard.\n/// The caller then fans out each shard's documents to all RF nodes in each group.\n///\n/// This per-batch grouping minimizes HTTP fan-out count (critical at scale).\nfn group_documents_by_shard(\n    documents: &[Value],\n    primary_key: &str,\n    topology: &Topology,\n) -> std::result::Result<HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>>, MeilisearchError> {\n    let mut shard_documents: HashMap<u32, Vec<Value>> = HashMap::new();\n\n    for doc in documents {\n        let pk_value = doc\n            .get(primary_key)\n            .and_then(|v| v.as_str())\n            .ok_or_else(|| {\n                MeilisearchError::new(\n                    MiroirCode::PrimaryKeyRequired,\n                    \"primary key value must be a string\",\n                )\n            })?;\n\n        let shard_id = shard_for_key(pk_value, topology.shards);\n        shard_documents\n            .entry(shard_id)\n            .or_default()\n            .push(doc.clone());\n    }\n\n    Ok(shard_documents)\n}\n\n/// Build an error response from a node error.\nfn build_error_response(resp: WriteResponse) -> DocumentsWriteResponse {\n    DocumentsWriteResponse {\n        taskUid: resp.task_uid.map(|uid| uid.to_string()),\n        indexUid: None,\n        status: None,\n        error: resp.message,\n        error_type: resp.error_type,\n        code: resp.code,\n        link: None,\n    }\n}\n\n/// Build a success response with optional X-Miroir-Degraded header.\nfn build_response_with_degraded_header(\n    response: DocumentsWriteResponse,\n    degraded_groups: u32,\n) -> std::result::Result<Response, MeilisearchError> {\n    let body = serde_json::to_string(&response).map_err(|e| {\n        MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n            format!(\"failed to serialize response: {}\", e),\n        )\n    })?;\n\n    let mut builder = Response::builder()\n        .status(StatusCode::OK)\n        .header(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\");\n\n    // Add X-Miroir-Degraded header if any groups were degraded\n    if degraded_groups > 0 {\n        builder = builder.header(HEADER_MIROIR_DEGRADED, format!(\"groups={}\", degraded_groups));\n    }\n\n    Ok(builder\n        .body(axum::body::Body::from(body))\n        .map_err(|e| MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ShardUnavailable,\n            format!(\"failed to build response: {}\", e),\n        ))?)\n}\n\n/// Build an error response as JSON (for forwarded node errors).\nfn build_json_error_response(resp: DocumentsWriteResponse) -> Response {\n    (\n        StatusCode::OK,\n        [(header::CONTENT_TYPE, \"application/json\")],\n        Json(resp),\n    )\n        .into_response()\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n    use miroir_core::api_error::{MiroirCode, MeilisearchError};\n    use serde_json::json;\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_extract_primary_key_common_fields() {\n        let doc_with_id = serde_json::json!({\"id\": \"test123\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_id), Some(\"id\".to_string()));\n\n        let doc_with_pk = serde_json::json!({\"pk\": \"test456\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_pk), Some(\"pk\".to_string()));\n\n        let doc_with_key = serde_json::json!({\"key\": \"test789\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with_key), Some(\"key\".to_string()));\n\n        let doc_with__id = serde_json::json!({\"_id\": \"test000\", \"name\": \"Test\"});\n        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc_with__id), Some(\"_id\".to_string()));\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_extract_primary_key_no_common_field() {\n        let doc = serde_json::json!({\"name\": \"Test\", \"value\": 42});\n        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc), None);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_extract_primary_key_priority() {\n        // Should return \"id\" first even if other fields exist\n        let doc = serde_json::json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"pk\": \"other\", \"key\": \"another\"});\n        assert_eq!(extract_primary_key(&doc), Some(\"id\".to_string()));\n    }\n\n    // Reserved field validation tests (P2.9)\n    //\n    // Tests the reserved field matrix per plan §5:\n    // - `_miroir_shard`: Always reserved (unconditional)\n    // - `_miroir_updated_at`: Reserved only when `anti_entropy.enabled: true`\n    // - `_miroir_expires_at`: Reserved only when `ttl.enabled: true`\n\n    /// Helper to build the expected reserved field error.\n    fn reserved_field_error(field: &str) -> MeilisearchError {\n        MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n            format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}`\", field),\n        )\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_miroir_shard_always_rejected() {\n        // _miroir_shard is ALWAYS reserved regardless of config\n        let err = reserved_field_error(\"_miroir_shard\");\n        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n        assert_eq!(err.error_type, miroir_core::api_error::ErrorType::InvalidRequest);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_miroir_updated_at_when_anti_entropy_enabled() {\n        // When anti_entropy.enabled: true, _miroir_updated_at is reserved\n        let field = \"_miroir_updated_at\";\n        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n            format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when anti_entropy.enabled: true)\", field),\n        );\n        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_miroir_expires_at_when_ttl_enabled() {\n        // When ttl.enabled: true, _miroir_expires_at is reserved\n        let field = \"_miroir_expires_at\";\n        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n            format!(\"document contains reserved field `{}` (reserved when ttl.enabled: true)\", field),\n        );\n        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_non_miroir_fields_allowed() {\n        // Non-reserved _miroir_ fields are allowed\n        let doc = json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_custom\": \"value\", \"_miroir_metadata\": {\"key\": \"val\"}});\n        assert!(doc.get(\"_miroir_custom\").is_some());\n        assert!(doc.get(\"_miroir_metadata\").is_some());\n    }\n\n    /// Test matrix of all reserved field combinations per plan §5 table.\n    ///\n    /// Matrix cells (write behavior):\n    /// | Field           | Config disabled | Config enabled |\n    /// |-----------------|-----------------|----------------|\n    /// | _miroir_shard   | REJECTED (always)  | REJECTED (always) |\n    /// | _miroir_updated_at | ALLOWED      | REJECTED (anti_entropy) |\n    /// | _miroir_expires_at | ALLOWED      | REJECTED (ttl) |\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_matrix() {\n        struct TestCase {\n            doc: Value,\n            description: &'static str,\n            has_shard: bool,\n            has_updated_at: bool,\n            has_expires_at: bool,\n        }\n\n        let test_cases = vec![\n            TestCase {\n                doc: json!({\"id\": \"test\"}),\n                description: \"clean document should pass\",\n                has_shard: false,\n                has_updated_at: false,\n                has_expires_at: false,\n            },\n            TestCase {\n                doc: json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_shard\": 1}),\n                description: \"_miroir_shard always rejected\",\n                has_shard: true,\n                has_updated_at: false,\n                has_expires_at: false,\n            },\n            TestCase {\n                doc: json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_updated_at\": \"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z\"}),\n                description: \"_miroir_updated_at allowed when anti_entropy disabled\",\n                has_shard: false,\n                has_updated_at: true,\n                has_expires_at: false,\n            },\n            TestCase {\n                doc: json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_expires_at\": \"2024-12-31T23:59:59Z\"}),\n                description: \"_miroir_expires_at allowed when ttl.disabled\",\n                has_shard: false,\n                has_updated_at: false,\n                has_expires_at: true,\n            },\n            TestCase {\n                doc: json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_custom\": \"value\"}),\n                description: \"non-reserved _miroir_ fields allowed\",\n                has_shard: false,\n                has_updated_at: false,\n                has_expires_at: false,\n            },\n            TestCase {\n                doc: json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_shard\": 1, \"_miroir_updated_at\": \"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z\"}),\n                description: \"multiple reserved fields present\",\n                has_shard: true,\n                has_updated_at: true,\n                has_expires_at: false,\n            },\n        ];\n\n        for tc in test_cases {\n            assert_eq!(tc.doc.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_some(), tc.has_shard, \"{}: shard check\", tc.description);\n            assert_eq!(tc.doc.get(\"_miroir_updated_at\").is_some(), tc.has_updated_at, \"{}: updated_at check\", tc.description);\n            assert_eq!(tc.doc.get(\"_miroir_expires_at\").is_some(), tc.has_expires_at, \"{}: expires_at check\", tc.description);\n        }\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_error_format_matches_meilisearch_shape() {\n        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n            \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_shard`\",\n        );\n\n        // Verify Meilisearch-compatible error shape: {message, code, type, link}\n        let json = serde_json::to_value(&err).unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(json[\"code\"], \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n        assert_eq!(json[\"type\"], \"invalid_request\");\n        assert!(json[\"message\"].is_string());\n        assert!(json[\"link\"].as_str().unwrap().contains(\"miroir_reserved_field\"));\n        assert_eq!(json[\"message\"], \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_shard`\");\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_error_all_fields_present() {\n        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n            \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_updated_at`\",\n        );\n\n        // Verify all required fields are present\n        assert!(!err.message.is_empty());\n        assert!(!err.code.is_empty());\n        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n        assert!(err.link.is_some());\n        assert!(err.link.unwrap().contains(\"miroir_reserved_field\"));\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_orchestrator_shard_injection_flow() {\n        // Simulate the orchestrator injection flow:\n        // 1. Client sends document WITHOUT _miroir_shard\n        // 2. Validation passes (no _miroir_shard present)\n        // 3. Orchestrator injects _miroir_shard for routing\n        // 4. Write proceeds with injected field\n\n        let client_doc = json!({\"id\": \"user:123\", \"name\": \"Test User\"});\n        assert!(client_doc.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_none(), \"client doc should not have _miroir_shard\");\n\n        // Simulate orchestrator injection (happens AFTER validation at line 279-290)\n        let mut doc_with_shard = client_doc.clone();\n        doc_with_shard[\"_miroir_shard\"] = json!(5);\n\n        assert_eq!(doc_with_shard[\"_miroir_shard\"], 5, \"orchestrator should inject _miroir_shard\");\n        assert!(doc_with_shard.get(\"id\").is_some(), \"primary key should still be present\");\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_validation_order() {\n        // _miroir_shard is checked BEFORE primary key validation (per acceptance criteria)\n        // This ensures clients can't bypass validation by including both fields\n\n        let doc_with_shard_no_pk = json!({\"_miroir_shard\": 1, \"name\": \"No PK\"});\n        assert!(doc_with_shard_no_pk.get(\"_miroir_shard\").is_some());\n        assert!(doc_with_shard_no_pk.get(\"id\").is_none());\n\n        // The validation should catch _miroir_shard first, not missing primary key\n        let err = reserved_field_error(\"_miroir_shard\");\n        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n    }\n\n    // P2.9: Complete reserved field matrix tests\n    //\n    // Matrix cells per plan §5:\n    // | Field           | Config disabled | Config enabled |\n    // |-----------------|-----------------|----------------|\n    // | _miroir_shard   | REJECTED        | REJECTED       |\n    // | _miroir_updated_at | ALLOWED    | REJECTED (AE)  |\n    // | _miroir_expires_at | ALLOWED    | REJECTED (TTL) |\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_matrix_shard_always_rejected() {\n        // _miroir_shard: Always reserved regardless of config\n        let err = reserved_field_error(\"_miroir_shard\");\n        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_matrix_updated_at_rejected_when_ae_enabled() {\n        // _miroir_updated_at: Rejected when anti_entropy.enabled: true\n        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n            \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_updated_at` (reserved when anti_entropy.enabled: true)\",\n        );\n        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_matrix_expires_at_rejected_when_ttl_enabled() {\n        // _miroir_expires_at: Rejected when ttl.enabled: true\n        let err = MeilisearchError::new(\n            MiroirCode::ReservedField,\n            \"document contains reserved field `_miroir_expires_at` (reserved when ttl.enabled: true)\",\n        );\n        assert_eq!(err.code, \"miroir_reserved_field\");\n        assert_eq!(err.http_status(), 400);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_matrix_updated_at_allowed_when_ae_disabled() {\n        // _miroir_updated_at: Allowed when anti_entropy.enabled: false\n        // When disabled, client values pass through end-to-end\n        let doc = json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_updated_at\": \"2024-01-01T00:00:00Z\"});\n        assert!(doc.get(\"_miroir_updated_at\").is_some());\n        assert!(doc.get(\"id\").is_some());\n        // No validation error would be raised in this case\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_reserved_field_matrix_expires_at_allowed_when_ttl_disabled() {\n        // _miroir_expires_at: Allowed when ttl.enabled: false\n        // When disabled, client values pass through end-to-end\n        let doc = json!({\"id\": \"test\", \"_miroir_expires_at\": \"2024-12-31T23:59:59Z\"});\n        assert!(doc.get(\"_miroir_expires_at\").is_some());\n        assert!(doc.get(\"id\").is_some());\n        // No validation error would be raised in this case\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_orchestrator_updated_at_stamping_when_ae_enabled() {\n        // When anti_entropy.enabled: true, orchestrator stamps _miroir_updated_at\n        // This test verifies the stamping logic (plan §13.8)\n\n        let client_doc = json!({\"id\": \"user:123\", \"name\": \"Test User\"});\n        assert!(client_doc.get(\"_miroir_updated_at\").is_none(), \"client doc should not have _miroir_updated_at\");\n\n        // Simulate orchestrator stamping (happens AFTER validation)\n        let mut doc_with_timestamp = client_doc.clone();\n        let now_ms = std::time::SystemTime::now()\n            .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)\n            .unwrap_or_default()\n            .as_millis() as u64;\n        doc_with_timestamp[\"_miroir_updated_at\"] = json!(now_ms);\n\n        assert!(doc_with_timestamp.get(\"_miroir_updated_at\").is_some(), \"orchestrator should stamp _miroir_updated_at\");\n        assert_eq!(doc_with_timestamp[\"_miroir_updated_at\"], now_ms, \"timestamp should be current ms since epoch\");\n        assert!(doc_with_timestamp.get(\"id\").is_some(), \"primary key should still be present\");\n    }\n}\n","numLines":1188,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1188}}}

      address: &str,\n222\t        index_uid: &str,\n223\t    ) -> Result<f64, Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {\n224\t        let url = format!(\n225\t            \"{}/indexes/{}/documents\",\n226\t            address.trim_end_matches('/'),\n227\t            index_uid\n228\t        );\n229\t\n230\t        let response = self\n231\t            .client\n232\t            .get(&url)\n233\t !response.status().is_success() {\n239\t            return Ok(500.0);\n240\t        }\n241\t\n242\t        let json: Value = response.json().await?;\n243\t        let results = json.get(\"results\").and_then(|v| v.as_array());\n244\t\n245\t        if let Some(docs) = results {\n246\t            if docs.is_empty() {\n247\t                return Ok(500.0);\n248\t            }\n249\t\n250\t            let mut total_length = 0u64;\n251\t            let mut field_count = 0u64;\n252\t\n253\t            for doc in docs {\n254\t                if let Some(obj) = doc.as_object() {\n255\t                    for (_key, value) in obj {\n256\t                        if let Some(s) = value.as_str() {\n257\t                            total_length += s.len() as u64;\n258\t                            field_count += 1;\n259\t                        }\n260\t                    }\n261\t                }\n262\t            }\n263\t\n264\t            if field_count > 0 {\n265\t                return Ok(total_length as f64 / field_count as f64);\n266\t            }\n267\t        }\n268\t\n269\t        Ok(500.0)\n270\t    }\n271\t}\n272\t\n273\t/// Collect all
